div.font:
ARROWS:
➡️ Solid = Data Flow
〰️ Dashed = Configuration
COLORS:
🔵 Blue = Network
🟢 Green = Apps
🔴 Red = Servers
🟡 Orange = Traffic
🟣 Purple = Tier 1
🔶 Gray = Management
TIERS:
📊 Tier 1 = Frontend
💻 Tier 2 = Backend
🗄️ Data = Database
FLOW:
Users → Public IP
→ AppGW → VMs
→ Database
